SELECT CASE WHEN T3.Segment = 'SME' THEN T1.A - T2.A WHEN T3.Segment = 'LAM' THEN T2.A - T3.A WHEN T3.Segment = 'KAM' THEN T3.A - T2.A END DIFF FROM ( SELECT AVG(Consumption) A FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013%' ) T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT AVG(Consumption) A FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013%' ) T2 ON 1 = 1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT AVG(Consumption) A FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013%' ) T3 ON 1 = 1

SELECT T1.Consumption / T2.Consumption, T2.Consumption / T3.Consumption, T3.Consumption / T1.Consumption FROM ( SELECT SUM(Consumption) / COUNT(CustomerID) AS Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013%' AND CustomerID IN ( SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME' ) ) T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT SUM(Consumption) / COUNT(CustomerID) AS Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013%' AND CustomerID IN ( SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'LAM' ) ) T2 ON 1 = 1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT SUM(Consumption) / COUNT(CustomerID) AS Consumption FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2013%' AND CustomerID IN ( SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM' ) ) T3 ON 1 = 1

SELECT (T1.ANNUAL_AVERAGE_SME - T1.ANNUAL_AVERAGE_LAM) AS DIFF_SME_LAM , (T1.ANNUAL_AVERAGE_LAM - T1.ANNUAL_AVERAGE_KAM) AS DIFF_LAM_KAM , (T1.ANNUAL_AVERAGE_KAM - T1.ANNUAL_AVERAGE_SME) AS DIFF_KAM_SME FROM ( SELECT AVG(Consumption) AS ANNUAL_AVERAGE_SME, AVG(Consumption) AS ANNUAL_AVERAGE_LAM, AVG(Consumption) AS ANNUAL_AVERAGE_KAM FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID IN ( SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME' ) AND CustomerID IN ( SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'LAM' ) AND CustomerID IN ( SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'KAM' ) AND Date LIKE '2013%' ) T1

SELECT ( SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'SME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'SME' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) - (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'LAM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'LAM' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS diff1 , ( SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'LAM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'LAM' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) - (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'KAM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'KAM' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS diff2 , ( SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'KAM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'KAM' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) - (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'SME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Segment = 'SME' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS diff3 FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date LIKE '2013%' AND T2.Currency = 'CZK'
1482: SELECT Segment, MAX(Percentage) - MIN(Percentage) AS percentage_point_change FROM ( SELECT Segment, (SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN Consumption END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN Consumption END)) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN Consumption END) AS Percentage FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2012%' OR Date LIKE '2013%' GROUP BY CustomerID, Segment ) AS T1 GROUP BY Segment

SELECT T1.Segment, MAX(PercIncrease) , MIN(PercIncrease) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT t1.Segment, SUM(CASE WHEN t2.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN t2.Consumption END) AS Consumption2012, SUM(CASE WHEN t2.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN t2.Consumption END) AS Consumption2013 FROM customers AS t1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID WHERE t2.Date LIKE '2012%' OR t2.Date LIKE '2013%' GROUP BY t1.Segment ) AS T2 ON T1.Segment = T2.Segment

SELECT Segment, MAX(percentage_increase) AS Biggest_increase, MIN(percentage_increase) AS Lowest_increase FROM ( SELECT T2.Segment, (SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) * 100 AS percentage_increase FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID )

SELECT Segment, MAX(100 * (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2013%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2012%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2013%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS "MAX%" FROM yearmonth WHERE Date LIKE '2012%' OR Date LIKE '2013%' GROUP BY Segment ORDER BY MAX(100 * (SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2013%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2012%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2013%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END)) DESC

SELECT Segment FROM ( SELECT T1.Segment, (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS percentage FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID ) WHERE percentage = ( SELECT MAX(percentage) FROM ( SELECT T1.Segment, (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS percentage FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID ) ) OR percentage = ( SELECT MIN(percentage) FROM ( SELECT T1.Segment, (SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2012%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date LIKE '2013%' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS percentage FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID ) )

169: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '1997' THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '1996' THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END) AS growth_rate FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M'

SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '1997' THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '1996' THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T2.date) = '1996' THEN T2.amount ELSE 0 END) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M'

SELECT 100 * SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1997' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) - 1 FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T4 ON T3.client_id = T4.client_id WHERE T4.gender = 'M'

SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1997' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T4 ON T3.client_id = T4.client_id WHERE T4.gender = 'M'

SELECT 100.0 * (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1997' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) AS growth_rate FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T4 ON T4.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.date) IN ('1996', '1997') AND T4.gender = 'M'
